1.title: Zoo Animal Hunt
1.storyIntro: Welcome back, Star Guardian! I need to find my animal friends. They are hiding around your home! Four zoo animals are out there. Can you find them all?

cards.hintText: This animal swings from trees and loves bananas. Look where things climb high...
cards.foundText: You found the Monkey card! The letter is... W!

cards.hintText: The king of the jungle! Has a big fluffy mane. Look where something roars...
cards.foundText: You found the Lion card! The letter is... I!

cards.hintText: Black and white, soft and cuddly. Loves bamboo. Look where it's cozy and quiet...
cards.foundText: You found the Panda card! The letter is... L!

cards.hintText: Orange with black stripes. Very fast and strong! Look where things pounce and play...
cards.foundText: You found the Tiger card! The letter is... D!

1.completionText: W-I-L-D! That spells WILD! All the zoo animals are free! 🦁🐯🐼🐵

2.title: Animal Colors
2.storyIntro: The animals are here... but they lost their colors! Let's mix some new colors to paint the animals. Can you mix pink, sky blue, and brown?

colors.promptText: Find something PINK in your home!
colors.speechText: Red and white make pink! Can you find something pink in your home?

colors.promptText: Find something LIGHT BLUE in your home!
colors.speechText: Blue and white make light blue! Can you find something light blue in your home?

colors.promptText: Find something BROWN in your home!
colors.speechText: Orange and black make brown! Can you find something brown in your home?

2.completionText: Amazing! Now the animals have their colors! Pink, light blue, and brown! 🎨

3.title: Farm Sounds
3.storyIntro: I can see the animals now, but... I still can't hear them! Some farm animals are making sounds in these jars. Listen closely — can you tell which animal is in each jar?
3.completionText: Moo! Baa! Neigh! Oink! Cluck! Now I can hear all the farm animals! 🎵

4.title: Animal Dance
4.storyIntro: I can hear the animals now, but... I want to move like them too! Let's do the Animal Dance! I'll show you a move, then YOU show me you can do it!
4.completionText: You moved like all the animals! Hop, stomp, swim, fly, crawl! You're the best animal dancer! 💃🐾

5.title: Animal Rescue
5.storyIntro: I have all my powers back, but... there's a baby animal who lost its mommy! Only the Heart Power can reunite them. Will you and your Earth Helper help the baby find its family?
5.puzzleMessage: One piece is missing... Ask your Earth Helper for the Heart Piece!
5.plantMessage: The baby animal needs a home! Earth Helper: give your child a small toy animal or draw one together!
5.certificateSubtext: has completed all 5 Animal Adventures and helped Twinkle reunite the animal families! The rescued animals are now safe and sound. Be kind to all animals every day!
5.completionText: We did it! The baby animal found its mommy! You are a true Animal Rescuer! 🐾❤️
